title: US-Iran talks to begin in Switzerland as Tehran says it closed Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: The US disputed Iran's claim the waterway is shut, a move Tehran says was a response to Israeli attacks in Lebanon.
summary_public: The US disputed Iran's claim the waterway is shut, a move Tehran says was a response to Israeli attacks in Lebanon.
